name: Chicky Farm
author: Poki
description: Chicky Farm is an idle game that puts you in charge of your very own chicken farm! Your days on the farm are filled with various tasks—feeding chickens with hay, assisting in hatching eggs, collecting eggs, and selling them. Use the earnings to buy more chickens or upgrade them. Need help? You can always hire workers to share the workload. Plus, you can customize the look of your farm to your liking! Cluck, cluck! How many happy chickens can you raise? How to play Chicky Farm? Click the feeder to fill it, and click the egg to pick it up! Who created Chicky Farm? Chicky Farm is created by PT New Games Plus. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Chicky Farm for free? You can play Chicky Farm for free on Poki. Can I play Chicky Farm on mobile devices and desktop? Chicky Farm can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
